message:
v0.3.3: add hard gate for >50% free predictions

Add unconditional hard gate: when >50% of disk is free, require
confidence >= 0.95 for any prediction. Consuming half a disk in
minutes is physically implausible for coding workloads.

Production evidence: vmi1167313 at 55% free predicted "disk full
in 3m" at 77% confidence — clearly a burst-inflated EWMA spike.

Fix test free_pct values to use realistic values (<50% free) since
tests were using 78-80% "free" when they meant "full".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
